name: fileReadInt
title: fileReadInt
syntax: long fileReadInt(char section[], char entry[], long def, char file[]);
description: Searches for the variable entry in the section section of the file filename. If its value is a number, this number is returned as the functional result. If the file or entry is not found, or if entry does not contain a valid number, the default value def is returned as the functional result.
The value 200 is assigned to the variable myAddress. If the entry ADDR does not exist in the file TEST.INI the default value 0 is assigned to myAddress.
example.code:
File TEST.INI:
[DATA]
NAME=Feld
ADDR=200
FIELD=1,2,3,0x20,100
...
myAddress=fileReadInt("DATA", "ADDR", 0, "TEST.INI");
...
